en.name: Minesweeper Flags
en.desc: The classic minesweeper game! Uncover safe cells while avoiding hidden mines. Use number clues to deduce mine locations and flag them!
en.howToPlay: Click to reveal a cell. Numbers show how many mines are adjacent. Right-click to place flags where you think mines are. Reveal all non-mine cells to win!
tips: Start by clicking corners or edges
A '1' means exactly one mine in the adjacent cells
Flags help you mark suspected mines

zh.name: 扫雷
zh.desc: 经典扫雷游戏！揭开安全格子同时避开隐藏的地雷。利用数字提示推断地雷位置并标记它们！
zh.howToPlay: 点击揭开格子。数字显示相邻有多少个地雷。右键单击在你认为有地雷的地方放置旗帜。揭开所有非地雷格子获胜！
tips: 从点击角落或边缘开始
数字'1'表示相邻格子恰好有一个地雷
旗帜帮助你标记疑似地雷
